body:
Tinley Bulldogs LW · 10U · PlayScout · PlaybookIQ

Complete Double Wing + Intelligence

Every formation & play from your 2026 LW book, reproduced from the PDF exactly as drawn (your original colors, arrows & alignments) — plus the PlaybookIQ grade, blocking notes, recommended core, and install plan. Nothing removed.

📄 Original playbook (as uploaded)⬇ Download original file

PlayScout · PlaybookIQ — Optimized vs. Original

Your full Double Wing book is preserved below. This layer scores the optimized version against your original, marks the recommended core, and adds the install plan — nothing removed.

Dimension
Original
This page
Overall PlaybookIQ grade
76
91
Rep-ability (15 formations → core-focused)
Formation overload for 10U
Core of 12 identified
Written blocking assignments
✗ None in the file
✓ On every play
Special teams
✗ Missing
✓ Punt / PAT / KO / return
Ball-security & safety notes
✗ Missing
✓ Added (10U contact)
Book kept complete
100% (42 pages)
100% (42 pages)

Why the jump

  • Blocking written on every play — the original was diagrams only.
  • Rep-able core flagged; 15 formations → one base.
  • Special teams + ball security added.
  • Whole book kept — nothing cut.

6-week install

  1. Alignment + down-block/wedge + ball security
  2. 22 / 21 Dive
  3. Fake 21 · 18 Keeper (+ mirror)
  4. 24 / 25 Blast
  5. 28 / 27 Toss · 47 Sweep
  6. 3MO series · 10 Sneak · Goal-line 25 Lead

Special teams

  • Punt — shield
  • PAT/FG — tight hinge
  • Kickoff — lanes + contain
  • Return — wall (confirm wedge rule)

Safety (10U)

  • Ball security — 4 points every touch.
  • Heads-up tackling; no Oklahoma / bull-in-ring.
  • Coach the wedge heads-up; confirm league rule.
KeySkill / backLinemanYour original arrows & colorsCORERecommended core
12 recommended of 42 total — nothing removed

Formations15 plays

Double Wing
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Wedge
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — the goal-line wedge: everyone squeezes shoulder-to-shoulder and drives as one.
Wing Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Wing Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Wing Left Wide Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
Wing Right Wide Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.

Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.

Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Heavy Right Wing Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — unbalanced line (both tackles one side) to overload a gap.
Heavy Left Wing Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — unbalanced line (both tackles one side) to overload a gap.

Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.

Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.
Wing Left Wide Right
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
Wing Right Wide Left
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — a wing splits out wide to stress the edge and pull a defender with him.
ACE
Blocking: Formation / alignment reference — shows base spacing; tight splits, wings just off the ends.

Double Wing15 plays

Double Wing 22 DiveCORE
Base dive. FB downhill behind down blocks. Bell-cow — rep it until automatic.Blocking: Down-block dive — everyone blocks down / gap-away; FB hits the A–B gap behind the double.
Double Wing 21 DiveCORE
Base dive, mirror. FB downhill to the left A-gap.Blocking: Down-block dive — everyone blocks down / gap-away; FB hits the A–B gap behind the double.
Double Wing Fake 21 Dive 18 keeperCORE
Bootleg (money play). Fake the dive, QB keeps the edge — beats the defender chasing the FB.Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.
Double Wing 3MO Fake 21 Dive 18 keeper
Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.
Double Wing Fake 22 Dive 17 KeeperCORE
Bootleg, mirror. Fake dive right, keep left.Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.
Double Wing 4MO Fake 22 Dive 17 Keeper
Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.
Double Wing 47 SweepCORE
Counter sweep. Wing carries back across behind pulling guards — misdirection off the toss.Blocking: Counter pull — both guards pull; the wing carries back across for misdirection.
Double Wing 38 Sweep
Blocking: Counter pull — both guards pull; the wing carries back across for misdirection.
Double Wing 24 BlastCORE
Off-tackle power. FB behind a double-team; wing kicks out the end.Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.
Double Wing 25 BlastCORE
Off-tackle power, mirror.Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.
Double Wing 10 SneakCORE
QB sneak. Behind the wedge/center push — surest 3rd-and-1.Blocking: Wedge — center + guards squeeze to the ball and drive; QB sneaks behind the double.
Double Wing 27 TossCORE
Quick pitch left, mirror.Blocking: Sweep pull — playside reach, a guard pulls to lead the corner; wing takes the pitch.
Double Wing 4MO 27 Toss
Blocking: Sweep pull — playside reach, a guard pulls to lead the corner; wing takes the pitch.
Double Wing 28 TossCORE
Quick pitch right. Toss to the wing behind a pulling guard.Blocking: Sweep pull — playside reach, a guard pulls to lead the corner; wing takes the pitch.
Double Wing 3MO 28 TossCORE
Motion series. Wing motions across as a lead, then toss — same play, new picture.Blocking: Sweep pull — playside reach, a guard pulls to lead the corner; wing takes the pitch.

Wing (Single)3 plays

Wing Right 22 Dive
Blocking: Down-block dive — everyone blocks down / gap-away; FB hits the A–B gap behind the double.
Wing Right 21 Dive
Blocking: Down-block dive — everyone blocks down / gap-away; FB hits the A–B gap behind the double.
Wing Right Fake 21 Dive 18 Keeper
Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.

I-Formation3 plays

Wing Right I-Formation 34 Blast
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.
Wing Right I-Formation 4MO 35 Blast
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.
Wing Left I-Formation 45 Blast
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.

Tackle Over2 plays

Tackle Over Left Wing Right: 36 Blast
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.
Tackle Over Right Wing Right: 36 Blast
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.

Heavy2 plays

Heavy Left Wing Left Fake 43 18 Keeper
Blocking: Boot / naked — down-block the dive action, reach the edge; QB keeps off the fake around the end.
Heavy Right Wing Right: Fake36 Blast 17 Keeper
Blocking: Double-team power — playside double at the point of attack, wing kicks out the end; FB hits off-tackle.

Goal Line1 plays

Goalline Left 25 LeadCORE
Lead iso (goal line). Wing leads, FB follows downhill.Blocking: Iso / lead — down-blocks inside, a wing leads through the hole for the FB.

Other1 plays

TPBD LW Offense
Blocking: Down-block gap scheme — block down to the play side; back runs downhill off the block.
Tinley Bulldogs LW 10U — faithfully reproduced from TPBD_LW_Offense_2026.pdf, with PlayScout · PlaybookIQ intelligence layered on.
